title: Agastheeswarar Temple
tagline: Agastheeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Agastheeswarar Temple (அகஸ்தீஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in the town of Agasthiyampalli, Nagapattinam district in Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Agastheeswarar Temple (அகஸ்தீஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in the town of Agasthiyampalli, Nagapattinam district in Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is revered in the seventh century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as the nayanmars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam. The temple is locally called Agasthiyar Kovil. It has several inscriptions dating back to the medieval Chola and later Pandya period.

topPlaces.name: Vedaranyeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Vedaranyeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Shiva, located in the town of Vedaranyam in Tamil Nadu, India. Vedaranyeswarar is revered in the 7th-century-CE Tamil Shaiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as the Nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam.

topPlaces.name: Vedaranyam taluk
topPlaces.description: Vedaranyam taluk is a taluk of Nagapattinam district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Vedaranyam block
topPlaces.description: Vedaranyam block is a revenue block in Nagapattinam district, Tamil Nadu, India. There are a total of 36 panchayat villages in this block.

topPlaces.name: Vedaranyam
topPlaces.description: Vedaranyam (Tamil: [ʋeːdaːɾaɳjam]) (also spelt as Vedaraniam and Vedaranniyam) is a town in Nagapattinam district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The town is named after the presiding deity of the Vedaranyeswarar Temple.

topPlaces.name: Thopputhurai
topPlaces.description: Thopputhurai, formerly known as Sethumadavapuram, is a town on the south eastern coast of Nagapattinam District, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Adhanur, Thanjavur
topPlaces.description: Adhanur is a village in the Vedaranyam taluk of Nagapattinam district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Point Calimere Wildlife and Bird Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Point Calimere Wildlife and Bird Sanctuary is a protected area in Tamil Nadu, South India, covering 21.47 km2 (8.29 sq mi) along the Palk Strait where it meets the Bay of Bengal at Point Calimere at the southeastern tip of Nagapattinam District. It was created in 1967 for the conservation of the blackbuck and also hosts large congregations of waterbirds, especially greater flamingos.

image.alt: Point Calimere Wildlife and Bird Sanctuary

topPlaces.name: Kodi Kuzhagar Temple
topPlaces.description: Kuzhagar Temple or Kodi Kuzhagar Temple (கோடிக் குழகர் கோயில்) (also called Amrithakadeswarar Temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in the town of Kodikkarai in Tamil Nadu, India. Kuzhagar is revered in the 7th century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as the nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam.

items.activity: Point Calimere Wildlife and Bird Sanctuary
items.note: Point Calimere Wildlife and Bird Sanctuary is a protected area in Tamil Nadu, South India, covering 21.47 km2 (8.29 sq mi) along the Palk Strait where it meets the Bay of Bengal at Point Calimere at the southeastern tip of Nagapattinam District. It was created in 1967 for the conservation of the blackbuck and also hosts large congregations of waterbirds, especially greater flamingos.

Kuzhagar Temple or Kodi Kuzhagar Temple (கோடிக் குழகர் கோயில்) (also called Amrithakadeswarar Temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in the town of Kodikkarai in Tamil Nadu, India. Kuzhagar is revered in the 7th century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as the nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Agastheeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Agastheeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Agastheeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (132 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (136 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Agastheeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Agastheeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Agastheeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Agastheeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Agastheeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vedaranyeswarar Temple, Vedaranyam taluk, Vedaranyam block, Vedaranyam, Thopputhurai.
